promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 or active A2 control memory from this batch.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the first bounded warm contradiction cluster because the two legacy Constraints batches and the Axis-4 QIT note are the strongest current REVISIT_REQUIRED theory packets in the requested lane.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batches already isolate entropic-monism pressure, path and engine overreach, Axis-4 identity drift, and label-locking problems without requiring a fresh raw-source pass.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The selected anchors provide cleaner local fences for nonliteral QIT translation, cycle-without-engine discipline, overlay-only personality handling, and current axis-semantics narrowing.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded pass so the engine-pattern contradiction cluster stays separate from this theory packet.
Not selected because the existing intake artifacts were sufficient for contradiction-preserving reduction.

raw_source_reread_reason: The selected parent batches plus the comparison anchors were sufficient to isolate preserved tensions, incompatible claims, maybe-equivalent claims, and quarantine recommendations for this bounded pass.

candidate_items.name: ANTI_SMUGGLING_GOVERNANCE_RESIDUE_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest governance residue from the legacy Constraints note while removing its inevitability overreach.

candidate_items.name: NONLITERAL_TRANSLATION_ONLY_FROM_LEGACY_ENTROPY_LANGUAGE_TO_QIT_BRIDGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the only clean maybe-equivalent route from warm entropy language into the Axis-0 bridge family without importing primitive time or scalar law.

candidate_items.name: LOOP_ORDER_AS_EVIDENCE_PROBE_NOT_AXIS4_IDENTITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest reusable probe scaffold from the Axis-4 note while refusing its identity overclaim.

candidate_items.name: CYCLE_LANGUAGE_REDUCED_TO_NON_ENGINE_STRUCTURE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Gives later passes a precise reduction rule for warm cycle and proto-engine language.

candidate_items.name: PERSONALITY_AND_TERRAIN_LABELS_AS_REMOVABLE_OVERLAY_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves label lineage while blocking psychology-style kernel authority.

quarantined_items.name: ENTROPIC_MONISM_AS_DIRECT_ACTIVE_WORLDVIEW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The stitched precursor worldview cannot backflow into active A2 control memory.

quarantined_items.name: I_SCALAR_OR_PATH_ENTROPY_AS_KERNEL_CLOCK_SELECTION_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: These are the strongest direct conflicts with later fail-closed entropy and path discipline.

quarantined_items.name: ENGINE_INEVITABILITY_FROM_CYCLE_OR_SURVIVOR_LANGUAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Cycle and survivorship rhetoric cannot directly authorize engine semantics.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS4_EQUALS_LOOP_ORDERING_THEOREM
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The Axis-4 note provides probe scaffolds, not a settled theorem-level identity.

quarantined_items.name: PERSONALITY_TYPING_AS_KERNEL_STAGE_MAP
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The repo-local cognition fence allows those labels only as explicit removable overlays.

quarantined_items.name: LEGACY_PRECURSOR_AS_ALREADY_EQUAL_TO_CLEAN_AXIS0_QIT_BRIDGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Only small translated fragments may be precursor-equivalent; full equivalence is not earned.

quarantined_items.name: TOPOLOGY_BUNDLE_HOPF_AS_FORCED_FROM_THE_PRECURSOR_CHAIN
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Those claims remain derivational pressure only, not earned closure.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable contradiction-handling rules in the cluster without smoothing the theory pressure away.
They remain source-linked, proposal-side, and suitable only for later selective comparison work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain overclaims, worldview packets, or premature equivalence moves rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
This batch exists to hold them visible, not to promote them.
notes: Operated from repo-held intake artifacts only after the required A2-mid prerequisite reads.
Did not append-save into active A2.
Built as a contradiction-preserving reduction packet for one bounded warm cluster only.
